headline: Core Holdings, Educated Guesses, And Falling Knives
summary: Most investors do not separate the workhorses from the bets they are still figuring out, and that confusion costs them the moment markets turn rough.

raw.headline: Core Holdings, Educated Guesses, And Falling Knives
raw.summary: Most investors do not separate the workhorses from the bets they are still figuring out, and that confusion costs them the moment markets turn rough.

headline: Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena on proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, tariffs impact on supply chain
summary: CNBC’s Frank Holland and Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the status of the company's proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, impact of tariffs on supply chain, and more.

raw.headline: Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena on proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, tariffs impact on supply chain
